title: SkyBlock Enhanced
description: The only Hypixel SkyBlock modpack you need. Built for modern Minecraft — 60+ optimized mods, a guided setup wizard, and a config system no other pack comes close to match.
body:
![Skyblock Enhanced banner featuring floating island worlds with a portal structure on the left and a village settlement on the right against a cloudy sky background, with decorative golden corner frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2737834de5f9d2dfe6d9f42d27b25b1b6ffbc90e.webp)

**Hypixel SkyBlock** is one of Minecraft's most popular game modes — deep progression, complex systems, and endless grind. But getting the right mods configured correctly is a headache most players know well: overlapping HUDs, wrong GUI scale, hours of tweaking just to get a clean screen.

**SkyBlock Enhanced** solves all of that. It's a complete, pre-configured modpack built specifically for Hypixel SkyBlock on **Minecraft 1.21.11+**, with over 60 mods already tuned and ready. Launch the game, follow the setup wizard, and you're playing — properly set up — in minutes.

![Decorative divider displaying 'DESCRIPTION'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5d6fe06a834eaa09a0f3a2abb826c1cb37b5cec.webp)

## What is SkyBlock Enhanced?

**SkyBlock Enhanced** is the go-to modpack for Hypixel SkyBlock, built on **Fabric** for modern Minecraft. With over 60 mods, more than a dozen focused purely on performance, and a custom setup system that configures everything for your screen and hardware — it's the most complete SkyBlock experience available on modern Minecraft.

No other pack does what SkyBlock Enhanced does with configuration. Five resolution-specific presets (1080p (gui scale 2x), 1080p (gui scale 3x), 1440p, 1440p ultrawide, 4K and 4k ultrawide) mean your HUDs and overlays are placed correctly for *your* screen out of the box. A first-launch wizard walks you through performance, UI style, and resource pack choices. And a full in-game config manager lets you export, import, back up, and swap setups without touching a single file manually.

---

## Key Features

- **First-launch Welcome Wizard** — guided setup for performance, UI layout, and resource packs on first launch
- **6 resolution-specific presets** — 1080p (gui scale 2x), 1080p (gui scale 3x), 1440p, 1440p ultrawide, 4K and 4k ultrawide, all pre-tuned
- **In-game Config Manager** — export, import, back up, and restore configs without leaving the game
- **12 performance mods** — dedicated to maximizing FPS and stability on any hardware
- **9 SkyBlock-specific QoL mods** — hundreds of features, pre-configured for a clean screen
- **Custom SkyBlock-themed main menu**
- **One-click updates** via the Modrinth App

![Decorative divider displaying 'JOIN US ON FLUXER'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/323cbdf475e6229a833a42f792ad422c9e7fc479.png)

**Need help? Want to share configs? Looking for updates?**

Join the official **SkyBlock Enhanced** community on **Fluxer** — a privacy-focused alternative to Discord. This is the recommended way to get support, share configs, and stay updated. We've moved to Fluxer to better protect your privacy, and we encourage everyone to make the switch.

**What you'll find:**
- Dedicated support and troubleshooting channels
- Community config sharing and custom presets
- Update and release announcements
- SkyBlock modding discussions

[**Join on Fluxer (Recommended)**](https://fluxer.gg/3jJy9cp6)

Prefer to stay on Discord? A server is still available, though Fluxer is recommended for privacy reasons.

[Join on Discord](https://discord.gg/pdwxyjTta7)

![Decorative divider displaying 'FEATURES'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec3227c1e61d07fb81d9d5b353b92d9121083934.webp)

## Performance and Optimization

With 13+ mods dedicated to performance, SkyBlock Enhanced runs smoothly on almost any hardware — fast load times, high frame rates, and stable memory usage.

### Performance Mods

| **Mod** | **Purpose** |
|---|---|
| Sodium | Rendering optimization for massive FPS boosts |
| ImmediatelyFast | Speeds up UI and entity rendering |
| FerriteCore | Reduces memory usage |
| Entity Culling | Skips rendering entities behind walls |
| Krypton | Network stack optimization |
| More Culling | Intelligent rendering culling |
| Lithium | General game logic optimization |
| Particle Core | Optimizes particle rendering |
| BadOptimizations | Miscellaneous performance fixes |
| Debugify | Fixes vanilla performance bugs |
| ModernFix | Reduces memory use and improves load times |
| Better Block Entities | Faster block entity rendering |

### Performance Presets

The Welcome Wizard lets you choose a performance profile on first launch:

- **Performance** — lower render distance and reduced visuals for maximum FPS on low-end hardware
- **Balanced** — close to default settings, recommended for most players
- **Shaders Balanced** — balanced settings with fast shaders enabled *(note: shaders may break some in-world overlays)*
- **Quality** — high render distance and maxed visual sliders for high-end systems
- **Shaders Quality** — everything maxed with Quality shaders enabled *(note: shaders may break some in-world overlays)*

---

## Customization and Configuration

This is where SkyBlock Enhanced stands apart from every other pack. Most modpacks drop you in with a fixed config and leave you to sort out the rest. SkyBlock Enhanced gives you a full system for setting up, managing, and sharing your configuration — all from inside the game.

### Welcome Wizard

On first launch, a guided setup wizard walks you through:

- **Performance Profile** — pick the right balance of FPS and visuals for your PC
- **Main menu style** — choose your preferred menu design
- **Tab design** — Skyblocker's fancy tab or SkyHanni's compact tab list
- **Item background style** — pick how item rarity is displayed
- **Storage design** — choose your preferred storage UI style
- **Sword Block** - choose if you want 1.8.9 sword block to be enabled when holding right click.
- **ScamScreener** — Configer ScamScreener Alert Level.
- **Modern UI** Configer Modern UI config values like custom font and tooltip.
- **Resource pack selection** — pick from five included packs
- **Review + apply** — see a full summary of every choice before anything is changed

### Resolution-Specific Config Presets

UI overlays shift when your resolution or GUI scale changes — elements that look perfect at 1080p can stack and overlap at 1440p. SkyBlock Enhanced ships with five presets, each with every overlay individually positioned for that exact setup:

| **Preset** | **For** |
|---|---|
| 1080p 2× | 1080p with GUI scale set to 2 |
| 1080p 3× | 1080p with GUI scale set to 3 |
| 1440p | 1440p displays
| 1440p Ultrawide | 1440p ultrawide displays |
| 4K | 4K displays |
| 4k Ultrawide | 4k ultrawide displays |

The best preset for your screen is applied automatically. No manual overlay repositioning needed.

### In-Game Config Manager

Over time you'll configure mods exactly how you like them. If you then decide to share or, unlucky, the config resets, the Config Manager lets you manage all of that without ever touching a file:

- **Configuration** — browse and apply official presets or your own exported ones
- **Export** — select specific files, add a name, description, target resolution, and author, then save as a shareable `.zip`
- **Import** — load a config pack from the imports folder, preview its contents, and apply
- **Backups** — create manual backups and restore them at any time; a backup is also created automatically before any preset is applied

**Example:** You spent hours perfecting your 1440p HUD layout. Export it, share it on Discord, and a friend can import it in seconds — no file copying, no folder digging.

---

## Quality-of-Life Features

With 9 SkyBlock-specific mods and 20+ general QoL mods, you have access to everything you'd want — all pre-configured for a clean, clutter-free screen.

<details>
<summary>SkyHanni</summary>

### SkyHanni

One of the best all-round mods for Hypixel SkyBlock, covering farming, combat, mining, events, and general QoL in one package.

- **Farming:** Crop milestone trackers with money-per-hour estimates
- **Events:** Diana waypoint helpers for Mythological Ritual burrows, Inquisitor sharing, and warp hotkeys
- **Combat:** Damage indicators and Slayer helpers; minion crafting support; Frozen Treasure highlights in Glacial Caves
- **Mining:** Mineshaft detection with party chat integration
- **UI:** Customizable HUD elements, cleaner scoreboard, compact tab list, chat improvements, inventory and mob highlighters, and optional HUDs for things like Hobby Factory helpers and price displays

</details>

<details>
<summary>Skyblocker</summary>

### Skyblocker

A long-running all-around QoL mod that keeps getting updated with new features across almost every part of the game.

- **Dungeons:** Puzzle solvers (Terminals, Creeper Beams, Blaze, Three Weirdos, and more), secret waypoints, Croesus chest profit tracking, full dungeon HUD with timers and score tracking
- **Overlays:** Custom waypoints for mining routes, Kuudra supplies, foraging nodes, commissions, and more
- **HUDs:** Customizable health, mana, defense, and XP bars; slayer and farming overlays
- **Inventory & Tooltips:** Quick-access buttons for storage, crafting, and accessory bag; Bazaar/AH prices and NPC values in tooltips; inventory profit calculations
- **Utilities:** Built-in wiki lookup, profile viewer, crafting helpers, event timers, and experiment table solvers

</details>

<details>
<summary>Firmament</summary>

### Firmament

From the same developer who maintained NEU, bringing its best features to modern Minecraft.

- Powerful storage overlay
- Item search bar working with all SkyBlock items (via REI)
- Flexible macro system for running chat commands via hotkeys
- Import your NEU button layout directly — no rebuilding from scratch
- Cursor position saving between inventories for faster navigation

</details>

<details>
<summary>Odin</summary>

### Odin

A dungeon and Kuudra focused utility mod built for endgame PvE.

- **Dungeons:** Puzzle solvers for Blaze, Creeper Beams, TP Maze, Quiz, Ice Fill, Boulder, Water Board, Three Weirdos, and Floor 7 terminals; Wither Dragon tracking; Melody helpers; full run stat tracking for secrets, score, and deaths
- **Kuudra:** Pearl waypoints, build phase helpers, and supply tracking
- All features are optional and fully configurable

</details>

<details>
<summary>ScamScreener</summary>

### ScamScreener

A client-side safety mod that scans chat in real time and flags scam patterns — phishing links, fake verification steps, suspicious invites, and more.

- Layered detection with optional local AI scoring — nothing is sent to a cloud service
- Warns you during trades, party invites, and co-op invites
- Manual player and pattern blacklisting

</details>

<details>
<summary>Other SkyBlock mods</summary>

### SkyBlock Profile Viewer

A modern replacement for NEU's `/pv`. Opens player profiles in-game with tabs for skills, slayers, catacombs, inventory, pets, ender chests, and more. Supports Light, Dark, and transparent themes, custom JSON themes, and PronounDB integration.

### Modern Warp Menu

A clean, modern warp interface inspired by the classic Fancy Warp Menu from 1.8.9. Shows a rendered view of all SkyBlock islands with clear warp buttons instead of the default chest GUI.

### SkyBlock Enhancements

A lightweight mod for small QoL tweaks not covered by larger mods — Missing Enchants detection, Command Confirmation Disabler, and a `/reminder` command for custom timed reminders.

### Scale Me

Scale your own model, other players, Hypixel NPCs, and held items — including off-hand separately. Includes animation controls (swing animation, 1.8 sword block), player name display in third person, and crosshair options.

### Bazaar Utils

Makes Bazaar trading faster and safer — custom buy/sell buttons, mistake prevention for large orders, one-click undercut, undercut chat alerts, item bookmarks, stash claiming via keybind, and price history shortcuts.

### SkyOcean

A compact QoL mod covering slayers, fishing, mining, and garden. Includes an item value screen, searchable storage, slayer highlights, trophy fish tracking, commission progress, HOTM perk tracking, and mineshaft alerts.

</details>

<details>
<summary>⌨️ Essential Keybinds</summary>

### General / Quick Access

- `F7` – Move GUI / Editor
- `M` – Warp Menu
- `K` – Toggle Shaders

### Wiki & Info (Skyblocker)

- `F1` – Fandom Wiki (hover over item)
- `F4` – Hypixel Wiki (hover over item)
- `F6` – Item Price Lookup

### Item Management (Skyblocker)

- `P` – Protect Item
- `H` – Lock Hotbar Slot
- `Z` – Bazaar Refresh

### SkyHanni

- `X` – Chat Peek
- `Z` – Garden Home / Mining Spot
- `H` – Set Garden Home / Rep Helper
- `B` – Barn Teleport
- `V` – Warp to Pest / Trapper
- `R` – Reset Fishing Timer
- `Y` – Share Waypoint
- `K` – Accept Visitor
- `Left Shift` – Fortune Breakdown
- `Left Ctrl` – Bypass Refuse Prevention

### SkyOcean

- `O` – Item Search
- `J` – Item Value
- `C` – Set Craft Helper Item

</details>

---

## Custom Main Menu

A SkyBlock-themed main menu to set the mood the moment you launch. Three styles are available, chosen during the Welcome Wizard:

- **Modern** — fully custom menu with a custom SkyBlock background
- **Modern Minimal** — custom buttons with the default panorama background instead
- **Minimal** — the vanilla menu with an added changelog button; recommended if you have other mods that add buttons to the main menu

## Installation Guide

### Prerequisites

- A valid **Minecraft Java Edition** account
- A stable internet connection
- The **Modrinth App** (free)

### Step 1: Download and Install Modrinth

1. Go to [modrinth.com/app](https://modrinth.com/app) and download the installer for your OS.
2. Run the installer and follow the prompts (Next → Next → Install).
3. The Modrinth App will open automatically when complete.

### Step 2: Add Your Microsoft Account

1. Click **Playing as** in the top-right corner.
2. Click the dropdown → **Log in** (green button).
3. Sign in with the Microsoft account that owns your Minecraft license.

### Step 3: Install SkyBlock Enhanced

1. Click **Discover content** (compass icon) in the left sidebar.
2. Select the **Modpacks** tab.
3. Search for **SkyBlock Enhanced**.
4. Click **⤓ Install**.

### Step 4: Allocate RAM

| **System RAM** | **Recommended** | **Heavy Mods** |
|---|---|---|
| 8GB | 3–4GB | 4GB |
| 16GB | 4GB | 6–8GB |
| 32GB+ | 4GB | 8–10GB |

**Check your RAM:** Press `Ctrl + Shift + Esc` → Performance → Memory.

**To allocate RAM for this instance:**
1. Open the instance and click the **gear icon** next to Play.
2. Go to **Java and Memory**.
3. Enable **Custom Memory Allocation** and adjust the slider.

### Step 5: Fix "Resource Reload Failed" Errors

If resource packs fail to load, add this JVM argument: `-Xss4M`

1. Open the instance's gear icon → **Java and Memory**.
2. Enable **Custom Java Arguments**.
3. Paste `-Xss4M` and close.

![Decorative divider displaying 'Mod List'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19ea0e1624809374d39957579dd400b727e66341.webp)

![Decorative divider displaying 'F.A.Q'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9abbe45bebb44d629ec6113cae5a66e5137054c.webp)

<details>
<summary>🧩 General</summary>

**Q: What is SkyBlock Enhanced – Modern Edition?**\
A: A pre-configured modpack for **Hypixel SkyBlock** on modern Minecraft (1.21.11+). It includes over 60 optimized mods, a first-launch setup wizard, five resolution-specific config presets, and an in-game config manager — all ready to go without any manual setup.

**Q: Can I use this on the Hypixel Network?**\
A: Yes — all included mods are **allowed on Hypixel**. They are client-side and do not automate gameplay. Always verify Hypixel's rules before adding your own mods.

**Q: Do I need to install or configure anything manually?**\
A: No. Everything is pre-installed and pre-configured. Install through the Modrinth App, launch, follow the wizard, and play.

**Q: What Minecraft version does this use?**\
A: **Minecraft 1.21.11+** on the **Fabric** mod loader.

</details>

<details>
<summary>⚙️ Installation & Setup</summary>

**Q: How do I install the pack?**\
A: Use the **Modrinth App**. See the installation guide above for step-by-step instructions.

**Q: The game crashes or won't start — what do I do?**\
A: Common fixes:
- Allocate more RAM (see the table in the installation guide)
- Add the JVM argument `-Xss4M` if you see "Resource Reload Failed"
- Make sure you're on **Java 21**

Still having trouble? Join the **Discord** for help.

**Q: How do I update the modpack?**\
A: Click **Update pack** in the Modrinth App when an update is available, then select the latest version.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🚀 Performance</summary>

**Q: Will this run on a low-end PC?**\
A: Yes. Choose the **Performance** profile in the Welcome Wizard for maximum FPS on older hardware.

**Q: How much RAM should I allocate?**

| System RAM | Recommended | Heavy Mods |
|---|---|---|
| 8GB | 3–4GB | 4GB |
| 16GB | 4–6GB | 6–8GB |
| 32GB+ | 6–8GB | 8–10GB |

**Q: Do shaders work?**\
A: Yes — Iris, Complementary Unbound, and MakeUp Ultra Fast are all included. Note that some SkyBlock overlays may not display correctly with shaders active.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🧰 Customization</summary>

**Q: What resolution presets are available?**\
A: Five presets are included: **1080p 2×**, **1080p 3×**, **1440p**, **1440p ultrawide**, and **4K**. The right one is applied automatically on first launch.

**Q: Can I change or reset my configuration?**\
A: Yes. The in-game **Config Manager** lets you apply presets, create backups, and restore them at any time.

**Q: Can I share my config with others?**\
A: Yes — use the **Export** tab in the Config Manager to package your configs as a `.zip` and share it. Others can import it directly in-game.

**Q: What does the Welcome Wizard set up?**\
A: Performance profile, menu and UI style, tab list design, item backgrounds, storage design, and resource packs — with a full review page before anything is applied.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔧 Troubleshooting</summary>

**Q: "Resource Reload Failed" when loading resource packs.**\
A: Add `-Xss4M` as a JVM argument in your instance's Java and Memory settings.

**Q: My FPS is still low.**
- Lower render distance in Video Settings
- Switch to the **Performance** profile
- Disable shaders
- Close background applications

**Q: My HUD elements are overlapping.**\
A: Switch to the preset that matches your screen resolution and GUI scale using the Config Manager. (If you still have overlapping HUD elements, report it in Discord so it can be fixed.)

**Q: Lag when opening menus.**\
A: Check if the narrator is enabled under Accessibility; if so, disable it.
</details>

<details>

<summary>💬 Support & Community</summary>

**Q: Where do I get help or report bugs?**\
A: Join us on Fluxer at [fluxer.gg/3jJy9cp6](https://fluxer.gg/3jJy9cp6). You can also join the Discord at [discord.gg/pdwxyjTta7](https://discord.gg/pdwxyjTta7) if you prefer.

</details>
